Chronology
2004 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2005 in KSW

The year 2004 was the first year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2004 Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 2 events beginning with, KSW I: Konfrontacja.

List of events

[edit]
# Event title Date Arena Location
1 KSW I: Konfrontacja February 27, 2004 Hotel Marriott Warsaw, Poland
2 KSW II: Konfrontacja October 7, 2004 Hotel Marriott Warsaw, Poland

KSW I: Konfrontacja

[edit]
KSW I: Konfrontacja
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateFebruary 27, 2004
VenueHotel Marriott
City Warsaw, Poland
Attendance300
Event chronology
KSW I: Konfrontacja KSW 2

'KSW I: Konfrontacja'[1] was a mixed martial arts event held on February 27, 2004 at the Hotel Marriott in Warsaw, Poland .

Results

[edit]
Fight Card
Weight Class Method Round Notes
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Łukasz Jurkowski def. Roman Szaszkow TKO (Submission to punches) 1 Tournament Final
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Roman Szaszkow def. Pawel Trzesniewski Submission (Armbar) 1 Tournament Semi-Finals 2
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Łukasz Jurkowski def. Benedykt Stepien Decision (unanimous) 2 Tournament Semi-Finals 1
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Roman Szaszkow def. Norbert Swierblewski Submission (Achilles Lock) 1 Tournament Quarter-Finals 4
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Benedykt Stepien def. Emiliusz Ręgiel Submission (Armbar) 1 Tournament Quarter-Finals 3
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Łukasz Jurkowski def. Rafal Tomasiuk Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 Tournament Quarter-Finals 2
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Paweł Trześniewski def. Marek Piechotka (Cancelled) Piechotka Injured Tournament Quarter-Finals 1

KSW II: Konfrontacja

[edit]
KSW II: Konfrontacja

Event chronology
KSW 1 KSW II: Konfrontacja KSW 3

KSW II: Konfrontacja[2] was a mixed martial arts event held on October 7, 2004 at the Hotel Marriott in Warsaw, Poland.

Results

[edit]

Light Heavyweight 93 kg Łukasz Jurkowski def. Tomasz Stanclik Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 3 Tournament Semi-Finals 2
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Antoni Chmielewski def. Krzysztof Mila Submission (Armbar) 2 Tournament Semi-Finals 1
